notes: Day 20 (Mar 19) UPDATE 8:15AM ET. Sources: CNN live D20, AJ liveblog D20, CNBC, Bloomberg, Fortune, CBS, NPR, NBC, Wikipedia, Investing.com, IAEA, DefenceSecurityAsia, Times of Israel liveblog, ABC, Newsweek, InsuranceJournal, Hengaw.

IRGC EVACUATION ORDERS — ENERGY WAR ESCALATION: IRGC declared Gulf energy sites 'legitimate targets' — named Samref refinery, Jubail petrochemical (Saudi), Ras Laffan, Mesaieed (Qatar), Al Hosn gas (UAE). Ordered immediate evacuations. Saudi Aramco reportedly evacuated Samref personnel. UAE shut down Habshan gas facilities in Abu Dhabi after Iranian attack. Saudi reports 2 refineries attacked.

IRAN 'REVENGE' CLUSTER STRIKES ON ISRAEL: Multiple-warhead + cluster munitions on central Israel — 2 killed Ramat Gan, 3 women killed West Bank hair salon by cluster fragments. Foreign worker killed by shrapnel at Moshav Adanim (earlier D20). Total Israel dead now 22+. Tel Aviv train station damaged.

OIL SURGES $110+: Brent surged to $110.40 Thursday AM (from $103.71 open). Asian markets plunging — Nikkei -2.7%, Kospi -2.6%, Hang Seng -1.4%. WTI $97.58. Energy war fully mutual = oil entering new price regime.

TRUMP THREATENS SOUTH PARS: 'US will massively blow up the entirety of the South Pars Gas Field' if Iran attacks Qatar again. Claims US 'knew nothing' about Israel's South Pars strike. Israel struck Asaluyeh energy complex.

CASPIAN SEA STRIKES: Israel struck Iranian naval targets in Caspian Sea — first time in war. Geographic expansion beyond Persian Gulf. IRIS Dena sinking confirmed off Sri Lanka (87 killed, 32 rescued).

PEZESHKIAN RESIGNATION CRISIS: President weighing resignation — IRGC blocking all decisions. Called IRGC 'reckless,' accused them of exposing Larijani. 'Entire system collapsing.' Analysts: Iran = military dictatorship, IRGC controls Islamic Republic. Request to meet Mojtaba refused.
IRAN EXECUTES SWEDISH CITIZEN on espionage charges. Major diplomatic incident amid war.
FED HOLDS RATES: Uncertainty elevated. War impact unclear. Energy prices threatening inflation.
LEBANON 968+ KILLED: Up from 886. Israel striking Litani bridges to cut off Hezbollah. 2 additional divisions. ~1M displaced. Naim Qassem: 'ready for long confrontation.'
ZELENSKY WARNING: 800+ Patriots fired Day 1 of Iran war. US manufactures ~60-65/month. Ukraine short of air-defense missiles. Putin views prolonged Iran war as beneficial.
KATAIB HEZBOLLAH: 5-day conditional pause on Baghdad embassy attacks. If conditions not met, 'intensified' attacks.

theoryBox: Day 20 — ENERGY WAR FULLY IGNITED: IRGC declares Gulf sites 'legitimate targets,' orders evacuations from Samref, Jubail, Ras Laffan, Mesaieed, Al Hosn. UAE shuts Habshan. Saudi 2 refineries hit. Brent surges $110+. Trump: 'massively blow up' South Pars if Qatar attacked again. Israel strikes Caspian Sea (first time). Pezeshkian resignation crisis — IRGC military dictatorship. Iran executes Swedish citizen. 5 killed in Israel by cluster munitions. Lebanon 968+. Fed holds. Zelensky: 800+ Patriots Day 1, US makes 60-65/mo. Energy war + nuclear crisis + political disintegration = three simultaneous escalation spirals.
theoryBox_fa: روز ۲۰ — جنگ انرژی کامل: سپاه: سایت‌های خلیج 'هدف مشروع.' تخلیه سامرف، جبیل، راس لفان، مسعید، الحصن. حبشان تعطیل. ۲ پالایشگاه سعودی. نفت ۱۱۰+. ترامپ: انهدام کامل پارس جنوبی. اسرائیل: خزر (اولین بار). پزشکیان استعفا — سپاه دیکتاتوری نظامی. اعدام شهروند سوئدی. ۵ کشته اسرائیل. لبنان ۹۶۸+. فدرال رزرو ثابت. زلنسکی: ۸۰۰+ پاتریوت روز اول. سه مارپیچ همزمان.

metrics.label: Day
metrics.desc: ENERGY WAR IGNITED. IRGC: Gulf sites 'legitimate targets.' Evacuations ordered. Trump: 'blow up' South Pars. Caspian strikes. Pezeshkian resignation. Iran = IRGC military dictatorship.

metrics.label: Cumul. missiles
metrics.desc: D20 est. 30: 'Revenge' multi-warhead + cluster on Israel (2 killed Ramat Gan, 3 killed WB). Saudi refineries hit. IRGC naming new Gulf targets. Rate up from early-D20 estimate.

metrics.label: Cumul. drones
metrics.desc: D20 est. 55: Kuwait dawn shootdown. Baghdad airport + embassy. Continued Gulf harassment. IRGC threatening named energy targets.

metrics.label: Brent crude
metrics.desc: Surged to $110.40 Thu AM from $103.71 open. Asian markets plunging: Nikkei -2.7%. WTI $97.58. Energy war = new price regime. IEA/SPR failing to contain.

metrics.label: Iran dead (Hengaw)
metrics.desc: Hengaw 5th report (D18): 4,789 military + 511 civilians. HRANA: 3,114. Health Ministry: 1,444 + 18,551 injured. No 6th report yet. 178 cities, 25 provinces.

metrics.label: Lebanon
metrics.desc: Up from 886. Israel destroying Litani bridges. 2 additional divisions. Khiam battle. ~1M displaced. Qassem: 'long confrontation.' Approaching 1,000.

metrics.label: Israel dead
metrics.desc: Up from 17. D20: 2 killed Ramat Gan (cluster), 3 women killed West Bank hair salon (cluster fragments), foreign worker Moshav Adanim. 3,727+ wounded.

metrics.label: Nuclear risk
metrics.desc: Isfahan underground. 440kg at 60% = 9 weapons. IAEA locked out of ALL 4 sites. South Pars struck. Trump threatens total destruction. Grossi: 'can't eliminate program.'

metrics_fa.label: روز
metrics_fa.desc: جنگ انرژی. سپاه: اهداف مشروع. تخلیه. ترامپ: پارس جنوبی. خزر. پزشکیان. دیکتاتوری.

metrics_fa.label: موشک
metrics_fa.desc: D20: ۳۰. انتقام خوشه‌ای اسرائیل (۵ کشته). پالایشگاه سعودی. اهداف جدید.

metrics_fa.label: پهپاد
metrics_fa.desc: D20: ۵۵. کویت. بغداد. خلیج. سپاه تهدید اهداف انرژی.

metrics_fa.label: نفت
metrics_fa.desc: ۱۱۰.۴۰ پنجشنبه. آسیا سقوط. نیکی -۲.۷٪. جنگ انرژی = رژیم قیمتی جدید.

metrics_fa.label: لبنان
metrics_fa.desc: پل‌های لیطانی تخریب. ۲ لشکر اضافه. ۱ میلیون آواره. قاسم: جنگ طولانی.

metrics_fa.label: خطر هسته‌ای
metrics_fa.desc: اصفهان زیرزمینی. ۴۴۰ کیلو. IAEA بسته. پارس جنوبی. ترامپ: نابودی کامل. گروسی: حذف غیرممکن.

sitrep: IRGC DECLARES GULF ENERGY SITES 'LEGITIMATE TARGETS': Named Samref refinery + Jubail petrochemical (Saudi), Ras Laffan + Mesaieed (Qatar), Al Hosn gas (UAE). Ordered immediate civilian evacuations. Saudi Aramco evacuated Samref personnel. UAE shut down Habshan gas facilities after Iranian attack. Saudi reports 2 refineries attacked. This is the most explicit energy escalation threat of the war — specific named targets with evacuation deadlines.

OIL SURGES TO $110+: Brent hit $110.40 Thursday AM, surging from $103.71 open. Asian markets plunging — Nikkei -2.7%, Kospi -2.6%, Hang Seng -1.4%, Taiex -1.4%. WTI $97.58. Dubai crude hit all-time high above $150 (unprecedented $50+ spread vs WTI). IEA/SPR release (400M bbl) failing to contain. EIA: >$95 next 2 months, <$80 Q3 if war ends. Energy war entering new price regime.

IRAN 'REVENGE' STRIKES ON ISRAEL: Multiple-warhead + cluster munitions on central Israel — 2 killed Ramat Gan area, 3 women killed in West Bank hair salon by cluster fragments. Foreign worker killed at Moshav Adanim. Tel Aviv train station damaged. Israel now 22+ dead, 3,727+ wounded. Cluster munitions increasingly effective at evading Iron Dome.

TRUMP THREATENS SOUTH PARS: Posted that US will 'massively blow up the entirety of South Pars Gas Field' if Iran attacks Qatar again. Claims US 'knew nothing' about Israel's South Pars strike. Israel struck Asaluyeh energy complex in coordination with Washington (per Israeli source to CNN). Trump distancing from Israel's energy strikes while threatening his own.

CASPIAN SEA STRIKES + GEOGRAPHIC EXPANSION: Israel struck Iranian naval targets in the Caspian Sea — first such strikes of the war. Major geographic expansion beyond Persian Gulf theater. Signals no Iranian maritime asset is safe. Combined with IRIS Dena sinking off Sri Lanka (87 killed, 32 rescued) — Iran's blue-water navy effectively destroyed.

PEZESHKIAN RESIGNATION CRISIS: President weighing resignation. IRGC blocking him from all military/strategic decisions. Won't let him speak to Supreme Leader. Called IRGC 'reckless,' accused them of exposing Larijani to Israeli strike. 'Entire system collapsing.' Analysts: Islamic Republic effectively ceased — Iran = IRGC military dictatorship. Mojtaba Khamenei refused meeting request.
IRAN EXECUTES SWEDISH CITIZEN on espionage charges during wartime — major diplomatic provocation. Demonstrates IRGC/judiciary operating independently of any peace framework.

LEBANON 968+ KILLED: Up from 886. Israel striking Litani bridges to cut off Hezbollah resupply. 2 additional divisions joining 3 already operating. Major battle at Khiam continues. ~1M displaced (19% population). Qassem: 'ready for long confrontation.' Trump admin backs operation but asked Israel to spare Beirut airport.

ZELENSKY WARNING: 800+ Patriot missiles fired on Day 1 of Iran war alone. US manufactures ~60-65/month. Ukraine critically short of air-defense missiles. Putin views prolonged Iran conflict as beneficial. War's resource consumption directly undermining Ukraine defense.

KATAIB HEZBOLLAH: 5-day conditional pause on Baghdad embassy attacks. If conditions not met, 'intensified' attacks. First crack in proxy coordination but conditions likely unmet. CIA Ratcliffe disputes Kent resignation over 'no imminent threat' claim. Fed holds rates — uncertainty elevated.
sitrep_fa: سپاه: سایت‌های انرژی خلیج 'هدف مشروع.' سامرف، جبیل، راس لفان، مسعید، الحصن. تخلیه فوری. آرامکو تخلیه. حبشان تعطیل. ۲ پالایشگاه سعودی.
نفت ۱۱۰+: پنجشنبه ۱۱۰.۴۰. آسیا سقوط — نیکی -۲.۷٪. دوبی ۱۵۰ بالاترین تاریخ. IEA/SPR ناکام. رژیم قیمتی جدید.
انتقام خوشه‌ای اسرائیل: ۲ رامات‌گان + ۳ کرانه باختری. ایستگاه تل‌آویو. اسرائیل ۲۲+ کشته. خوشه‌ای از گنبد آهنین فرار.
ترامپ: 'انهدام کامل پارس جنوبی' اگر قطر دوباره. آمریکا 'نمی‌دانست' درباره حمله اسرائیل. اما اسرائیل با واشنگتن هماهنگ.
خزر: اسرائیل حمله دریایی خزر — اولین بار. گسترش جغرافیایی. IRIS دنا غرق سریلانکا (۸۷ کشته). نیروی دریایی ایران نابود.
پزشکیان: استعفا. سپاه مانع تصمیمات. 'سیستم فروپاشی.' تحلیلگران: دیکتاتوری نظامی سپاه. مجتبی جلسه رد.
لبنان ۹۶۸+: پل‌های لیطانی. ۲ لشکر اضافه. خیام. قاسم: جنگ طولانی.
زلنسکی: ۸۰۰+ پاتریوت روز اول. آمریکا ۶۰-۶۵/ماه. اوکراین کم‌موشک. پوتین = جنگ طولانی مفید.
کتائب: توقف ۵ روزه مشروط. فدرال رزرو ثابت. عدم قطعیت.

dailySeries.sourceLabel: D1-D10: JPost. D11: UAE MoD. D12-D20: fragment est. D20: IRGC declares Gulf energy sites targets, orders evacuations. Revenge cluster strikes on Israel (5 killed). Caspian Sea naval strikes (first time). Saudi 2 refineries hit. UAE Habshan shutdown. Rate slightly up from early-D20 on revenge escalation.

oil.note: Full daily series. D20: Brent surged to $110.40 Thu AM (Investing.com/Nation Thailand) on energy war escalation — IRGC evacuation orders + Habshan shutdown + Saudi refineries hit. Dubai crude hit all-time high >$150 (unprecedented $50+ spread vs WTI). IEA 400M bbl SPR release + US 172M bbl failing to contain prices. EIA: >$95 next 2mo, <$80 Q3 if war ends. Asian markets plunging. Energy war = new price regime.

latestTargetBreakdown.note: Mar 19 (D20) estimate. IRGC declares Gulf energy sites 'legitimate targets' with named list. Revenge cluster strikes on Israel. Saudi 2 refineries hit. UAE Habshan shutdown. Caspian Sea strikes. Volume revised up on revenge escalation.

dailyRows.primary: All-theater: UAE (Al Dhafra, Dubai airport, Palm Jumeirah), Israel (Tel Aviv, Haifa), Saudi (Ras Tanura), Qatar (Al Udeid), Kuwait, Bahrain, Jordan
dailyRows.capability: Operation Roaring Lion / True Promise IV launched within hours. 480 ballistic missiles + 720 drones on D1. Fastest Iranian response ever — suggests pre-positioned C2.
dailyRows.cost: Khamenei killed. IRIS Dena sunk by US submarine off Sri Lanka. Brent $72 (+$7). Hormuz shipping halted immediately — 150 ships stalled.
dailyRows.assessment: Overwhelming opening salvo. Iran distributing fire across 13 countries to overwhelm defenses.

dailyRows.primary: Peak launch day. UAE heaviest target. Israel: 124 injured from 10-warhead ballistic missile at Tel Aviv.
dailyRows.capability: 520 missiles + 850 drones — highest single-day volume. Iran expending stockpile rapidly.
dailyRows.cost: Brent $79.45 (CNBC). Iran state media confirms Khamenei family killed. Assembly of Experts emergency session. Jebel Ali Port fire, AWS data center hit.
dailyRows.assessment: Peak fury. Iran burning through inventory at unsustainable rate.

dailyRows.primary: Kuwait (6 US KIA at Shuaiba Port operations center), Bahrain, Saudi (US Embassy Riyadh drones), Israel (Hezbollah joins)
dailyRows.capability: 400+530. Kuwaiti F/A-18 friendly-fire shoots down 3 US F-15Es (all 6 crew survive). Hezbollah opens second front.
dailyRows.cost: 6 US KIA — first American combat deaths. Brent ~$83. Qatar arrests 10 IRGC cell operatives.
dailyRows.assessment: War expands. US casualties mount. Hezbollah + Iraqi militias = multi-front.

dailyRows.primary: Nuclear sites: Natanz entrance destroyed, Isfahan, Fordow access roads hit, Arak targeted
dailyRows.capability: 350+480. Declining from peak but still massive. Coalition strikes nuclear infrastructure.
dailyRows.cost: IAEA confirms Natanz inaccessible. Enrichment stockpile unverified 8+ months. Humanitarian crisis emerging.
dailyRows.assessment: Nuclear dimension activated. Escalation risk from enrichment uncertainty.

dailyRows.primary: Hezbollah long-range missile at Tel Aviv. Israel 250+ strikes on Lebanon. IRIS Dena confirmed sunk.
dailyRows.capability: 250+350. Clear decline. Senate rejects war powers resolution. CSIS: first 100 hours = $3.7B.
dailyRows.cost: Lebanon front fully active. Brent ~$90. Senate gives Trump political cover.
dailyRows.assessment: Decline accelerating. Political constraints loosening domestically.

dailyRows.primary: Qatar (14 ballistic + 4 drones per MoD), Kuwait, Bahrain, UAE
dailyRows.capability: 150+220. Fars claims >500 missiles, ~2,000 drones cumul. Rate ↓69% missiles, ↓74% drones.
dailyRows.cost: Brent ~$92. IEA triggers largest coordinated SPR release in history (400M bbl). War cost ~$2B/day.
dailyRows.assessment: Iran's ballistic capability declining structurally. Economic war intensifying.

dailyRows.primary: Continued Gulf + Israel harassment. Iraq: PMF HQs struck across multiple provinces.
dailyRows.capability: 100+160. Rate ↓79% missiles. >60% of Iranian launchers neutralized. 43 naval vessels destroyed.
dailyRows.cost: Brent $92.69 (CNBC). VLCC freight rates approaching records. Ruwais refinery shut (922K bbl/day offline).
dailyRows.assessment: Iran losing conventional capability. Asymmetric phase beginning.

dailyRows.primary: Diminished volume across Gulf. Iraq militia attacks intensify. F-35 shoots down Iranian Yak-130 — first F-35 air-to-air kill.
dailyRows.capability: 70+110. Rate ↓85%. Red Crescent: 65 schools, 32 medical facilities damaged.
dailyRows.cost: Brent intraday volatility. IEA Oil Market Report: 'largest supply disruption in history.' 20 Mb/d offline. Iran internet blackout persists.
dailyRows.assessment: Conventional campaign near-spent. Iran shifting to economic leverage.

dailyRows.primary: UAE MoD cumul: 1,422 UAVs detected (1,342 intercepted). All 8 cruise missiles intercepted.
dailyRows.capability: 50+80. Rate ↓90%. UAE air defenses showing strain but holding.
dailyRows.cost: Brent hits $119.50 — 52-week high (Investing.com). IEA: 'within whisker of $120.' Then crashes on SPR release news. Extreme volatility.
dailyRows.assessment: Oil price spike signals market panic. SPR intervention buys temporary relief.

dailyRows.primary: Mojtaba Khamenei designated new Supreme Leader by Assembly of Experts. NATO intercepts 2nd missile over Turkey.
dailyRows.capability: 40+60. Rate ↓92%. Trump claims war 'very complete, pretty much.' Then backtracks.
dailyRows.cost: Brent crashes to $88.43 (CNBC) — post-SPR selloff. EIA settles $94. Turkey deploys F-16s to N. Cyprus. 10,000+ civilian sites damaged in Iran.
dailyRows.assessment: Political transition in Iran. Conventional capability near-exhausted but regime intact.

dailyRows.primary: UAE reports continued intercepts. Gulf state coordination improving. Iraq: 300+ militia attacks cumul since D1.
dailyRows.capability: 27+81 (scaled from UAE MoD). Missile launches at lowest sustained level. Drones maintaining higher volume — cheaper, harder to suppress.
dailyRows.cost: Brent ~$91. Trump signals drawdown but Pentagon contradicts. Mixed messages on endgame.
dailyRows.assessment: Drone-missile divergence: missiles near-depleted but drone harassment continues at meaningful level.

dailyRows.primary: UAE MoD: 13 missiles (6 ballistic + 7 cruise) + 39 drones intercepted (official). Bahrain airport drones + fuel tanks fire. Ship hit in Hormuz.
dailyRows.capability: UAE cumul: 268 ballistic + 15 cruise + 1,514 UAVs. Fortune: Brent $90.96 AM. Drone attacks on airports emerging as pattern.
dailyRows.cost: Brent $91.98 close (CNBC). UKMTO: 16+ ships attacked cumul. Container ship fire in Hormuz.
dailyRows.assessment: Low-volume but high-disruption attacks on civilian infrastructure.

dailyRows.primary: Bahrain airport hit. Kuwait airport targeted. Dubai explosions. Abu Dhabi old airport fire. Container ship attacked near Jebel Ali.
dailyRows.capability: 8+40. KC-135 Stratotanker crashes western Iraq — 6 US KIA (total now 13). 4th US aircraft lost. Iran militias claim credit.
dailyRows.cost: Brent first >$100 close: $100.46 (CNBC). Fortune AM: $99.84. French CWO Frion killed near Erbil — first non-US allied death.
dailyRows.assessment: US losses mounting. Oil breaking $100 sustainably. French casualty internationalizes war.

dailyRows.primary: New Supreme Leader Khamenei first statement (written only — no video). Vows Hormuz stays closed. 3 more ships struck. Kuwait power lines hit by debris.
dailyRows.capability: 10+30. CENTCOM: 6,000+ US targets struck. 90+ Iranian vessels destroyed. Ballistic ↓86% from D1. UNSC Res 2817 condemns Iran 13-0-2.
dailyRows.cost: Brent $99.32 (CNBC). Khamenei statement fuels speculation on injuries. $10M bounty on Khamenei. State Dept: 'likely disfigured.'
dailyRows.assessment: Khamenei's absence and written-only statement suggests serious injuries. IRGC operating autonomously.

dailyRows.primary: UAE 9 ballistic + 33 drones intercepted (AJ). Qatar 4 ballistic + drones. Saudi 51 drones — LARGEST single-day barrage targeting kingdom. Kuwait airport drones. Jordan: 79/85 intercepted over week 2.
dailyRows.capability: 20+70. DRONE VOLUME TICKED UP — Saudi's 51-drone barrage a significant escalation. Kharg Island: 90+ military targets struck by CENTCOM (sparing oil). White House: ballistic ↓90%, drones ↓95%, 65+ vessels sunk.
dailyRows.cost: Brent $103.14 Fri close (CNBC). Fujairah oil hub fire from drone debris. IRGC declares UAE bases 'legitimate targets.' Trump 'not ready for deal.' May hit Kharg 'a few more times just for fun.'
dailyRows.assessment: Drone escalation despite missile depletion. Saudi barrage = Iran still has UAV stockpile. Kharg strike shows coalition restraint on oil — but for how long?

dailyRows.primary: Heaviest single-night bombardment since D1: Isfahan, Shiraz (20+ explosions), Tehran, Dezful, Khomein, Hamedan, Jask port. 6+ provinces. 10+ hypersonic missiles at Israel.
dailyRows.capability: 25+60. IRGC fires 10+ HYPERSONIC missiles at Israel — capability escalation. Israel critically low on ballistic interceptors (Semafor). IDF: 7,600+ strikes in Iran, 1,100+ in Lebanon cumul.
dailyRows.cost: 15+ killed Isfahan. Shiraz residential areas hit. 10,000+ homes destroyed (Tehran governor). 56 cultural sites damaged. Pope calls ceasefire. Pahlavi outlines transition. Houthis threaten Red Sea resumption.
dailyRows.assessment: Hypersonic escalation + interceptor crisis = war's most dangerous moment since D1. Houthi threat = potential second maritime chokepoint.

dailyRows.primary: Israel new Tehran strikes (smoke over capital). Dubai airport drone fire (flights suspended→limited). Abu Dhabi missile kill. Fujairah drone fire. Saudi 37 drones intercepted (AJ). Baghdad airport rockets. Israel: 245 attack waves total.
dailyRows.capability: DRONE VOLUME SURGED — Saudi 37 drones alone is highest single-day count from kingdom. IRGC claims most weapons cache intact and hasn't used post-2025 missiles yet. If true, Iran's offensive depth is much greater than ↓90% suggests. Israel planning 3+ more weeks of strikes.
dailyRows.cost: Brent $106+. Gulf exports ↓61% (Reuters/Kpler). US wounded revised to ~200. Hormuz coalition failing — Australia, Japan, Germany all declined. G5 'gravely concerned' re Lebanon. Trump threatens NATO umbrella + Xi summit.
dailyRows.assessment: IRGC 'arsenal intact' claim is the most significant D17 development. If true, Iran has been deliberately rationing — using old stock while preserving modern missiles. This reframes the entire attrition narrative. War may have much longer tail than assumed.

dailyRows.primary: DECAPITATION: Larijani + Soleimani confirmed killed. UAE full airspace closure. Qatar 13/14 ballistic intercepted. Saudi 12+ drones. Baghdad Al-Rasheed Hotel + embassy targeted. Abu Dhabi 1 killed. Tanker struck off Fujairah. Israel ground invasion of Lebanon.
dailyRows.capability: Decapitation accelerating but Qatar 13/14 ballistic missiles = Iran still has meaningful ballistic capability. IRGC 'cache intact' claim from D16 gaining credibility. Israel ground ops in Lebanon = second full front.
dailyRows.cost: Joe Kent (NCTC director) resigned — 'Iran not a threat.' Trump: don't need NATO. Delayed China trip 1 month. France: 'never' Hormuz during war. Amnesty: 170+ schoolgirls killed in US strike.
dailyRows.assessment: Crosscurrents: Military decapitation vs economic leverage. Israel destroying command structure but Iran's remaining capability + Hormuz control = strategic stalemate. First tanker transit could signal beginning of negotiated passage framework.

dailyRows.primary: ENERGY + NUCLEAR WAR: Israel struck South Pars (AM). Iran hit Ras Laffan LNG TWICE (PM). Bushehr NPP 'hostile projectile' (IAEA: no reactor damage, Rosatom suspended construction). 5th senior kill (Basij head + Khatib). Kuwait 4 ballistic + 20 drones. Multi-warhead at Israel (2 killed). Saudi 4 ballistic at Riyadh DURING FM meeting + drone at gas facility.
dailyRows.capability: ENERGY WAR FULLY MUTUAL + NUCLEAR DIMENSION. Ras Laffan x2, South Pars, Bushehr NPP all hit in single day. Iran named specific Gulf targets (Samref, Jubail, Mesaieed, Al Hosn). Multi-warhead Khorramshahr-4 + Qadr. Israel striking northern Iran. D19 missile count REVISED UP from 35→40 on 2nd Ras Laffan confirmation.
dailyRows.cost: Brent $107.38 close (CNBC), spiked $111+ after-hours. Gas $3.84 (+29%). Fed held rates. Pentagon $200B+. Qatar expelled attaches. Saudi: 'right to military action.' 12 FM joint statement. E3 backing military defense. Hengaw: 5,300 dead. Lebanon 880+. Kataib Hezbollah conditional pause. IMO emergency meeting.
dailyRows.assessment: INFLECTION: Energy + nuclear. Bushehr projectile = nuclear-adjacent escalation. Ras Laffan x2 = Qatar's LNG industry threatened. E3 military backing + 12 FM statement + Saudi warning = diplomatic momentum toward intervention OR escalation. Kataib Hezbollah pause offer = first crack in Iran proxy unity. IMO corridor = international shipping institutions mobilizing. Every constraint dissolving simultaneously.

dailyRows.primary: ENERGY WAR ESCALATION + REVENGE: IRGC declares Gulf energy sites 'legitimate targets' — names Samref, Jubail, Ras Laffan, Mesaieed, Al Hosn. Orders evacuations. UAE shuts Habshan gas. Saudi 2 refineries hit. Iran 'revenge' cluster munitions on Israel — 2 killed Ramat Gan, 3 women killed West Bank hair salon. Israel strikes Caspian Sea (first time). Trump: 'blow up' entire South Pars.
dailyRows.capability: D20 revised up from 25→30 missiles on revenge cluster escalation. IRGC naming targets = systematic energy war doctrine, not opportunistic strikes. Cluster/multi-warhead missiles evading Iron Dome. Caspian Sea expansion = Iran's naval assets nowhere safe. CENTCOM: 7,800+ targets, 120+ vessels. Zelensky: 800+ Patriots Day 1 alone — US makes 60-65/mo.
dailyRows.cost: Brent surges $110+ (from $103.71 open). Asian markets plunging: Nikkei -2.7%, Kospi -2.6%. Dubai crude >$150 all-time high. Pezeshkian resignation crisis — IRGC military dictatorship. Iran executes Swedish citizen. Fed holds. Lebanon 968+. Israel 22+ dead. Kataib 5-day pause.
dailyRows.assessment: THREE SIMULTANEOUS ESCALATION SPIRALS: (1) Energy war — IRGC naming targets, evacuations, Habshan shutdown, $110 oil; (2) Nuclear crisis — Isfahan underground, IAEA locked out, Grossi 'can't eliminate'; (3) Political disintegration — Pezeshkian crisis, IRGC dictatorship, Swedish execution. War's political, economic, and military dimensions all escalating independently. No single off-ramp addresses all three.

timeline.title: Week 3 (Mar 16–22)
timeline.body: ENERGY WAR IGNITED: IRGC declares Gulf sites 'legitimate targets,' orders evacuations from named facilities. UAE Habshan shutdown. Saudi refineries attacked. Brent $110+. Trump threatens total South Pars destruction. Caspian Sea strikes. Pezeshkian resignation = IRGC military dictatorship. Iran executes Swedish citizen. Israel cluster revenge kills 5. Lebanon 968+ (Litani bridges targeted). Three simultaneous spirals: energy + nuclear + political disintegration.

timeline.title: Week 4–5 (Mar 23–Apr 5)
timeline.body: IRGC follow-through on named targets = critical variable. If Samref, Jubail, Mesaieed, Al Hosn actually struck: oil $130+, Saudi military entry triggered, all Gulf logistics collapse. If threats remain aspirational: energy war as coercive pressure framework. Isfahan nuclear unresolved. US missile resupply crisis (Zelensky: 800+ Patriots Day 1, 60-65/mo produced). Lebanon Litani operation culminating. Pezeshkian resignation could formalize IRGC takeover.

timeline.title: Month 2 (Apr–May)
timeline.body: Three crises converge: (1) Energy — IRGC targeting doctrine vs Gulf defenses + bypass routes; (2) Nuclear — Isfahan underground + IAEA locked out = breakout window; (3) Political — IRGC dictatorship + Pezeshkian crisis = no negotiating partner. US missile supply becomes binding constraint. Hormuz permission-based framework either formalizes or collapses. Oil market in structural disruption.

timeline.title: Month 3+ (May onward)
timeline.body: If IRGC follows through on energy targets: permanent regional restructuring. Saudi entry = wider war. If political disintegration accelerates: IRGC-only government with no diplomatic facade. Nuclear verification crisis defines decade. US must choose between sustained ops (resource depletion) and exit (nuclear + energy unresolved). No clean outcome available.

timeline.title: Endgame variables
timeline.body: IRGC follow-through on named energy targets. Saudi military entry decision. US missile resupply timeline (Zelensky data). Isfahan nuclear breakout window. Pezeshkian resignation / IRGC formalization. Hormuz permission framework. Trump South Pars threat. Lebanon Litani outcome. Caspian Sea escalation. Swedish execution diplomatic fallout.

timeline_fa.title: هفته ۳ (۱۶–۲۲ مارس)
timeline_fa.body: جنگ انرژی: سپاه اهداف مشروع. تخلیه. حبشان. پالایشگاه سعودی. نفت ۱۱۰+. ترامپ: پارس جنوبی. خزر. پزشکیان = دیکتاتوری. اعدام سوئدی. ۵ کشته اسرائیل. لبنان ۹۶۸+. سه مارپیچ.

timeline_fa.title: هفته ۴–۵
timeline_fa.body: سپاه اهداف نام‌برده = متغیر حیاتی. اگر سامرف/جبیل: نفت ۱۳۰+، ورود عربستان. اصفهان حل‌نشده. موشک آمریکا بحران. لبنان لیطانی. پزشکیان = رسمی شدن سپاه.

timeline_fa.title: ماه ۲
timeline_fa.body: سه بحران: انرژی + هسته‌ای + سیاسی. موشک آمریکا محدودکننده. هرمز رسمی یا فروپاشی.

timeline_fa.title: ماه ۳+
timeline_fa.body: سپاه اهداف انرژی = بازسازی دائمی. ورود عربستان = جنگ گسترده‌تر. سپاه بدون نما = بدون مذاکره. هسته‌ای دهه. آمریکا: ادامه یا خروج.

timeline_fa.title: متغیرهای پایانی
timeline_fa.body: سپاه اهداف انرژی. عربستان. موشک آمریکا (زلنسکی). اصفهان. پزشکیان. هرمز. ترامپ پارس جنوبی. لبنان. خزر. سوئد.

scenarioProbabilities.name: Escalation spiral / total war
scenarioProbabilities.body: INCREASED from 38%. IRGC naming specific Gulf energy targets + ordering evacuations = systematic energy war doctrine. If follow-through on Samref/Jubail/Mesaieed/Al Hosn: Saudi military entry triggered → total regional war. Brent $110+ already. Three simultaneous spirals (energy + nuclear + political disintegration) = compound escalation risk. Pezeshkian crisis removes diplomatic brake. IRGC military dictatorship = no negotiating partner. Isfahan underground enrichment unresolved. Caspian Sea expansion shows geographic limits dissolving.

scenarioProbabilities.name: Declared victory + exit
scenarioProbabilities.body: DECREASED from 25%. Johnson 'objectives met' rhetoric undercut by: $110 oil, IRGC energy escalation, Lieu 'short of missiles,' Zelensky warning about Patriot depletion. Hard to declare victory when oil surging and IRGC issuing new target lists. CENTCOM stats (7,800+ targets, 120+ vessels) still provide narrative cover but energy war escalation makes exit harder. Lebanon 968+ killed = no clean exit there either.

scenarioProbabilities.name: Protracted attrition
scenarioProbabilities.body: INCREASED from 18%. IRGC energy targeting doctrine + US missile supply constraints = recipe for drawn-out conflict. Neither side can achieve decisive victory: IRGC can sustain drone/missile harassment + energy threats; US running low on precision munitions. Zelensky data (800+ Patriots Day 1, 60-65/mo production) = US burns through inventory faster than it can replenish. War becomes attritional resource competition.

scenarioProbabilities.name: International intervention / ceasefire
scenarioProbabilities.body: UNCHANGED. More institutional momentum (E3 + 12 FM + IMO + Macron moratorium) but IRGC energy escalation = higher barrier to ceasefire. Pezeshkian crisis = who negotiates? Iran executes Swedish citizen DURING war = contempt for diplomatic norms. Kataib Hezbollah 5-day pause = only crack. Russia (Rosatom) could pressure but hasn't. Isfahan nuclear demands IAEA access that IRGC won't grant.

scenarioProbabilities.name: Regime fracture / IRGC formalization
scenarioProbabilities.body: REFRAMED. Not regime collapse but IRGC formalization. Pezeshkian crisis = constitutional government already sidelined. IRGC blocking president from decisions, refusing meetings with Supreme Leader. If Pezeshkian resigns: Iran formally becomes military dictatorship. This is HAPPENING, not hypothetical. But it doesn't end the war — it makes it harder to end because there's no civilian authority to negotiate.

scenarioProbabilities.name: Negotiated deal
scenarioProbabilities.body: DECREASED from 4%. Pezeshkian crisis = no civilian negotiating partner. Iran executes Swedish citizen = diplomatic contempt. IRGC naming energy targets = escalating, not negotiating. Isfahan underground = no verification mechanism. Hormuz permission-based transit = backdoor de-escalation possible but not formal deal. Political conditions worse for negotiation than any previous day.

scenarioProbabilities_fa.name: مارپیچ تشدید / جنگ تمام‌عیار
scenarioProbabilities_fa.body: افزایش از ۳۸٪. سپاه اهداف نام‌برده + تخلیه = دکترین جنگ انرژی. سه مارپیچ. پزشکیان = بدون ترمز. خزر. اصفهان. نفت ۱۱۰+.

scenarioProbabilities_fa.name: اعلام پیروزی + خروج
scenarioProbabilities_fa.body: کاهش از ۲۵٪. نفت ۱۱۰ + سپاه تشدید + لیو کم‌موشک = خروج سخت‌تر. جانسون = روایت ضعیف‌تر.

scenarioProbabilities_fa.name: فرسایشی
scenarioProbabilities_fa.body: افزایش. سپاه + محدودیت موشک آمریکا = طولانی. زلنسکی: ۸۰۰+ پاتریوت روز ۱.

scenarioProbabilities_fa.name: مداخله بین‌المللی
scenarioProbabilities_fa.body: ثابت. نهادها بیشتر اما سپاه مانع بزرگ‌تر. پزشکیان = مذاکره با کی؟ اعدام سوئدی.

scenarioProbabilities_fa.name: رسمی‌سازی سپاه
scenarioProbabilities_fa.body: بازتعریف. پزشکیان بیرون. سپاه دیکتاتوری. در حال وقوع. اما جنگ سخت‌تر.

scenarioProbabilities_fa.name: مذاکره
scenarioProbabilities_fa.body: کاهش. پزشکیان = بدون طرف. اعدام سوئدی = تحقیر. سپاه تشدید. اصفهان = بدون تأیید.

theoryEvaluation.title: Three simultaneous escalation spirals — D20's defining framework
theoryEvaluation.body: D20 reveals three independent escalation spirals, each capable of triggering further escalation in the others: (1) ENERGY: IRGC naming specific Gulf targets + ordering evacuations = systematic doctrine. Habshan shutdown + Saudi refineries = follow-through already beginning. Oil $110+ = market confirming. (2) NUCLEAR: Isfahan underground + IAEA locked out + Grossi 'can't eliminate' = breakout window expanding under fog of war. (3) POLITICAL: Pezeshkian crisis + IRGC dictatorship + Swedish execution = Iran losing civilian governance. These spirals interact: energy escalation demands diplomatic response but political disintegration removes negotiating partner; nuclear crisis demands verification but IRGC won't grant access. No single intervention addresses all three.

theoryEvaluation.title: US resource constraints becoming binding — Zelensky's data point
theoryEvaluation.body: Zelensky's revelation that 800+ Patriot missiles were fired on Day 1 alone, while the US manufactures only 60-65/month, is the war's most significant resource constraint data point. Combined with Lieu's 'short of missiles' warning and the $200B+ supplemental request, a picture emerges: the US military campaign is consuming precision munitions faster than they can be replaced. This has three implications: (1) Strike tempo must decrease regardless of political will; (2) Ukraine's air defense is being degraded by Iran war resource diversion; (3) Any war extension requires munition rationing that could expose Gulf allies to greater Iranian attacks.

theoryEvaluation.title: IRGC as sole governing authority — Pezeshkian crisis implications
theoryEvaluation.body: Pezeshkian's marginalization is not merely a political crisis — it fundamentally changes the war's diplomatic architecture. If the IRGC is the only decision-making authority and they are ESCALATING (naming energy targets, ordering evacuations), then: (1) There is no civilian off-ramp; (2) International diplomatic frameworks (UN, E3, etc.) have no counterpart to negotiate with; (3) The war becomes a US/Israel vs IRGC military contest with no political resolution mechanism; (4) Even a military defeat of IRGC forces may not produce a government capable of agreeing to terms. Iran executing a Swedish citizen during wartime confirms IRGC/judiciary operate outside any diplomatic framework.

theoryEvaluation_fa.title: سه مارپیچ تشدید همزمان — چارچوب D20
theoryEvaluation_fa.body: سه مارپیچ مستقل: (۱) انرژی: سپاه اهداف نام‌برده = دکترین. حبشان + سعودی = شروع. نفت ۱۱۰+. (۲) هسته‌ای: اصفهان + IAEA بسته + گروسی 'حذف نمی‌شود.' (۳) سیاسی: پزشکیان + دیکتاتوری سپاه + اعدام سوئدی. تعامل: تشدید انرژی = نیاز دیپلماسی اما فروپاشی سیاسی = بدون طرف.

theoryEvaluation_fa.title: محدودیت منابع آمریکا — داده زلنسکی
theoryEvaluation_fa.body: ۸۰۰+ پاتریوت روز ۱. آمریکا ۶۰-۶۵/ماه. لیو: کم‌موشک. ۲۰۰+ میلیارد. نتیجه: کاهش اجباری. اوکراین آسیب. جنگ طولانی = جیره‌بندی.

theoryEvaluation_fa.title: سپاه تنها مرجع — بحران پزشکیان
theoryEvaluation_fa.body: پزشکیان بیرون = معماری دیپلماتیک تغییر. سپاه تشدید = بدون مسیر غیرنظامی. مذاکره با چه کسی؟ اعدام سوئدی = خارج از چارچوب.

endstate.title: Most likely (42%)
endstate.body: Escalation spiral driven by three simultaneous crises. IRGC naming energy targets = systematic doctrine. If Samref/Jubail/Mesaieed struck: Saudi entry → total regional war. Oil $130+. If aspirational threats only: energy coercion framework. Either way, Isfahan underground + IAEA locked out = nuclear crisis deepening. Pezeshkian crisis = no negotiating partner. IRGC dictatorship means war can only end through military exhaustion or total regime collapse — diplomatic resolution mechanism doesn't exist. Caspian Sea expansion shows geographic limits dissolving. War's trajectory is toward wider conflict, not resolution.

endstate.title: Second (20%)
endstate.body: Protracted attrition / declared victory hybrid. US missile constraints (Zelensky data: 800+ Patriots Day 1, 60-65/mo production) force tempo reduction regardless of political will. Johnson 'objectives met' provides narrative cover for reduced operations. But IRGC energy threats prevent clean exit. War settles into low-intensity phase: IRGC drone/missile harassment + energy threats vs reduced US/Israel strikes. Oil remains $100-110. Neither side can achieve decisive outcome. Most realistic medium-term scenario.

endstate.title: Emerging (10%)
endstate.body: International intervention. E3 + 12 FM + IMO + Macron moratorium = institutional momentum. But Pezeshkian crisis = who accepts ceasefire? IRGC won't negotiate. Isfahan demands IAEA access IRGC won't grant. Swedish execution = diplomatic contempt. Intervention most likely takes form of: Hormuz corridor + partial oil flow + quiet understanding, rather than formal ceasefire. Kataib Hezbollah 5-day pause = only crack.

endstate.title: Wild card (5%)
endstate.body: IRGC follows through on ALL named energy targets simultaneously. Samref + Jubail + Mesaieed + Al Hosn hit in coordinated strike. Oil $150+. Saudi declares war. UAE follows. Total Gulf war = catastrophic for global economy. Alternatively: Pezeshkian resignation + IRGC formalization triggers internal power struggle. Or: US missile supply crisis forces unplanned drawdown exposing allies.

endstate_fa.title: محتمل‌ترین (۴۲٪)
endstate_fa.body: مارپیچ سه‌گانه. سپاه اهداف انرژی. اگر حمله: ورود عربستان = جنگ تمام. اصفهان + IAEA = هسته‌ای بدتر. پزشکیان = بدون مذاکره. فقط فرسودگی نظامی یا فروپاشی. خزر = بدون مرز جغرافیایی.

endstate_fa.title: دوم (۲۰٪)
endstate_fa.body: فرسایشی / اعلام پیروزی. محدودیت موشک = کاهش اجباری. جانسون = روایت. اما سپاه = خروج نامیسر. نفت ۱۰۰-۱۱۰.

endstate_fa.title: نوظهور (۱۰٪)
endstate_fa.body: مداخله. نهادها بیشتر اما پزشکیان = مذاکره با کی؟ اعدام سوئدی. هرمز کریدور = غیررسمی ممکن.

endstate_fa.title: غیرمنتظره (۵٪)
endstate_fa.body: سپاه تمام اهداف همزمان = نفت ۱۵۰+. عربستان جنگ. یا پزشکیان استعفا = قدرت داخلی. یا بحران موشک آمریکا.

shippingRoutes.detail: Unchanged. Regional aviation collapsed. Iran named UAE targets including Al Hosn gas. IRGC evacuation orders. Habshan shutdown. Dubai airport intermittently operating. This route remains permanently dead for duration of conflict.
shippingRoutes.eta: N/A — route permanently disrupted for duration of conflict

shippingRoutes.detail: Closed. NATO intercepted missiles over Turkey. Iraq 250K bbl/day via Ceyhan = Turkey–Iraq oil corridor functional but Turkey–Iran border remains shut for commercial traffic. Swedish execution may complicate European transit arrangements.
shippingRoutes.eta: Not viable until conflict ends + diplomatic normalization

shippingRoutes.detail: Still most viable but DECLINING. Israel now striking Caspian Sea (geographic expansion to northern theater). CENTCOM: 7,800+ targets, 25 provinces. IRGC military dictatorship = internal logistics increasingly military-controlled. Pezeshkian crisis suggests institutional breakdown. Johnson rhetoric MAY reduce strike tempo but energy war escalation argues against.
Eastern borders not directly in combat zone but infrastructure minimal. Caspian Sea strikes = northern/eastern expansion. No change in assessment.
shippingRoutes.eta: Months to establish if even possible

shippingRoutes_fa.detail: بدون تغییر. سپاه: الحصن هدف. حبشان تعطیل.
بسته. عراق نفت از ترکیه. اعدام سوئدی = پیچیدگی اروپا.
هنوز بهترین اما کاهشی. خزر = گسترش شمال. ۷,۸۰۰+ هدف. سپاه دیکتاتوری = لجستیک نظامی.

publishingStatus: Paper supply: CRITICAL. No change. Hormuz closed + rial collapsed. IRGC military dictatorship = civilian economy subordinated to war effort.
Internet blackout: 3+ weeks. Total communications isolation continues. Pezeshkian crisis confirmed IRGC controls all communications.
Power outages: WORSENING. CENTCOM: 7,800+ targets. 178 cities, 25 provinces. Caspian Sea strikes = geographic expansion. Energy infrastructure on BOTH sides being targeted.
Isfahan + Shiraz: Both under sustained bombardment. Isfahan underground facility survived but above-ground devastated. Caspian strikes reaching new regions.
56+ cultural sites damaged. 5,300+ dead (Hengaw). 25 provinces struck. IRGC relocating to civilian spaces = increased collateral risk to publishing infrastructure.
New title production: Effectively halted. IRGC military dictatorship = no civilian economic planning. Energy war escalation = power/logistics worsening.

Assessment: Iranian publishing industry in existential crisis. IRGC formalization removes any civilian recovery planning. Energy war = infrastructure deteriorating further. Recovery timeline: years minimum, assuming conflict ends soon — which appears increasingly unlikely.
publishingStatus_fa: کاغذ: بحرانی. سپاه دیکتاتوری = اقتصاد تابع جنگ.
قطع اینترنت: ۳+ هفته. پزشکیان = سپاه کنترل.
قطع برق: بدتر. ۷,۸۰۰+ هدف. خزر = گسترش.
اصفهان + شیراز: بمباران. زیرزمینی باقی اما روی‌زمین ویران.
تولید متوقف. سپاه = بدون برنامه اقتصادی.
بحران وجودی. بازسازی: سال‌ها. جنگ انرژی = بدتر.
impactIranfarhang: PRIMARY ROUTE DEAD: Tehran→Dubai→Atlanta completely non-functional. IRGC named UAE energy targets. Habshan shutdown. No improvement possible.

BEST ALTERNATIVE DECLINING: Armenia (Agarak/Norduz) — viability reduced to 15-20%. Caspian Sea strikes = northern theater expanding. IRGC military dictatorship = internal logistics military-controlled. Still best option but worsening.

SUPPLY SOURCE CRITICAL: CENTCOM 7,800+ targets, 25 provinces. Caspian Sea expansion. IRGC in civilian spaces. Energy war destroying remaining infrastructure. 5,300+ dead. Pezeshkian crisis = no civilian planning for economic recovery.

OFAC STATUS: Informational materials exemption (31 CFR §560.210(c)) remains valid. But Iran executing Swedish citizen + IRGC military dictatorship = compliance environment tightening. E3 military involvement continues. Watch for new designation actions.
FINANCIAL: Rial in freefall. Brent $110+. Dubai crude $150+ all-time high. Energy war escalation = financial flows worsening. IRGC controls economy = civilian financial channels disrupted.

WINDOW CLOSING: Three simultaneous spirals = no single off-ramp. Pezeshkian crisis removes diplomatic channel. IRGC energy escalation = war intensifying not winding down. Johnson 'objectives met' rhetoric increasingly disconnected from reality of $110 oil and IRGC target lists.
impactIranfarhang_fa: مسیر اصلی مرده. سپاه: الحصن. حبشان تعطیل.
ارمنستان: ۱۵-۲۰٪. خزر = گسترش. سپاه = لجستیک نظامی.
منبع بحرانی: ۷,۸۰۰+ هدف. خزر. سپاه در مدنی. ۵,۳۰۰+ کشته. پزشکیان = بدون برنامه.
OFAC: معتبر. اما اعدام سوئدی + سپاه = سخت‌تر.
مالی: ریال. نفت ۱۱۰+. دوبی ۱۵۰+. سپاه = اقتصاد.
پنجره بسته: سه مارپیچ = بدون مسیر. پزشکیان = بدون دیپلماسی. جانسون = غیرواقعی.
prepIranfarhang: Armenia route: Reduced viability 15-20%. Caspian Sea strikes expanding northern theater. Monitor daily for strike patterns near Agarak/Norduz corridor.
Identify ANY Tehran warehouse partners still operational despite IRGC military dictatorship. IRGC controls logistics = civilian access uncertain.
Pre-negotiate Yerevan→port (Poti, Georgia or Batumi)→sea freight→US routing. This remains only viable long-haul option.
Accelerate procurement of any accessible pre-war inventory — this window is narrowing as IRGC absorbs civilian resources.
Brief university library clients on supply disruption timeline. Revise expectations to 6-12 month procurement window minimum.
Monitor KEMCO payment channel capacity — Swedish execution + IRGC dictatorship = European banking compliance tightening.
Prepare contingency for TOTAL supply interruption lasting 12+ months. Three simultaneous spirals = no near-term resolution.
Monitor Isfahan nuclear situation — IAEA locked out, Grossi 'can't eliminate.' Any nuclear development triggers new global sanctions.
NEW: Watch IRGC follow-through on named Gulf targets. If Samref/Jubail/Mesaieed struck: oil $130+, regional logistics total collapse, all alternatives disrupted.
NEW: Pezeshkian resignation watch. If formalized: IRGC dictatorship = no civilian economic recovery channel.
signalsIranfarhang: CRITICAL: IRGC follow-through on named targets (Samref, Jubail, Mesaieed, Al Hosn) — if struck, ALL logistics collapse. Oil $130+.
CRITICAL: Pezeshkian resignation — if formalized, IRGC dictatorship official. No civilian recovery channel. Compliance nightmare.
CRITICAL: Isfahan underground enrichment — IAEA locked out, Grossi 'can't eliminate.' Nuclear breakout during fog of war = new sanctions.
CRITICAL: Saudi military entry decision — 'reserved right to military action.' If triggered: total Gulf war.
WATCH: Caspian Sea strikes — if expanding into northern Iran, Armenia corridor directly threatened.
WATCH: US missile resupply — Zelensky: 800+ Patriots Day 1, 60-65/mo. Lieu: 'short.' If confirmed, forced drawdown.
WATCH: Swedish execution diplomatic fallout — European compliance tightening? KEMCO impact?
WATCH: Oil trajectory — $110 today. If $120+: global recession risk = political pressure for resolution OR acceleration.
signalsIranfarhang_fa: بحرانی: سپاه اهداف نام‌برده — اگر حمله: همه فروپاشی. نفت ۱۳۰+.
بحرانی: پزشکیان استعفا = سپاه رسمی. بدون بازسازی.
بحرانی: اصفهان — IAEA بسته. شکست هسته‌ای = تحریم.
بحرانی: عربستان — اگر وارد: جنگ تمام.
impactKIP: Iran-UAE corridor: DEAD. IRGC named Al Hosn gas (UAE) as target. Habshan shutdown. IRGC evacuation orders. Risk maximum and INCREASING.

UAE asset risk: EXTREME. Upgraded from HIGH. IRGC named specific UAE targets with evacuation deadlines. Habshan gas shutdown = real impact. E3 military backing continues. UAE operating under active missile/drone threat with named target list.

Hormuz: Traffic slightly increasing — permission-based. But IRGC energy escalation contradicts. If IRGC follows through on named targets, permission framework collapses. Currently: 21 tankers since war began vs 100+ daily pre-war. Shadow fleet = half of transits.

QATAR: Ras Laffan 'extensive damage.' Attaches expelled. Force majeure ongoing. IRGC named Mesaieed as target. Qatar's entire LNG industry under threat. Qatar FM in 12-state joint statement demanding Iran halt.

Banking: IRGC military dictatorship + Swedish execution = compliance TIGHTENING. Isfahan nuclear = potential new designations. Johnson rhetoric ≠ reality. Brent $110+ = market pricing continued conflict. KEMCO French bank channel under pressure.

Physical security: IRGC named specific energy targets across Gulf with evacuation timelines. 200+ Ukrainian anti-drone experts improving defenses but Iran demonstrating ability to hit energy infrastructure. Operating environment DETERIORATING.
impactKIP_fa: ایران-امارات: مرده. سپاه: الحصن هدف. حبشان تعطیل. تخلیه.
دارایی‌ها: شدید. از بالا ارتقا. سپاه اهداف نام‌برده + تخلیه. حبشان = تأثیر واقعی.
هرمز: افزایش جزئی اما سپاه تشدید = تناقض. ۲۱ نفتکش از شروع.
قطر: راس لفان آسیب گسترده. مسعید هدف. تخلیه. LNG تهدید.
بانکداری: سپاه + اعدام سوئدی = سخت‌تر. اصفهان = تحریم جدید؟ KEMCO فشار.
امنیت: اهداف نام‌برده + زمانبندی تخلیه. ۲۰۰+ اوکراینی اما بدتر.

Establish emergency communication protocols (satellite phone, third-country relay). IRGC evacuation orders = 'hours' timeline.
Diversify banking away from UAE — consider Oman, Turkey, or other jurisdictions. Swedish execution + IRGC dictatorship = European compliance tightening.
Suspend ALL UAE-bound shipments indefinitely. Habshan shutdown + IRGC targeting = active danger zone.
Prepare legal contingency for potential UAE asset freeze or enhanced sanctions screening. IRGC dictatorship may trigger new OFAC actions.
Identify alternative logistics hubs: Oman (Muscat/Sohar), Turkey (Mersin), Georgia (Poti/Batumi). Iraq Ceyhan route = oil only.
Monitor insurance market — IRGC named targets + Habshan + Ras Laffan + Isfahan + Bushehr = premiums catastrophic. May need to self-insure.
Brief all personnel in UAE on physical security. IRGC evacuation orders with 'hours' timeline for named targets. Consider temporary relocation.
Monitor Isfahan nuclear — IAEA locked out. Grossi: 'can't eliminate.' Any nuclear development = new global compliance regime.

NEW: Pezeshkian resignation = IRGC dictatorship formalized. All Iran-related compliance tightens further.
prepKIP_fa: فوری: ارزیابی دارایی‌ها — الحصن هدف. حبشان تعطیل.
آمادگی حقوقی. سپاه = اقدامات جدید OFAC؟
جدید: سپاه اهداف = تعطیلی کامل خلیج.
جدید: پزشکیان = سپاه رسمی. تمام ایران سخت‌تر.

CRITICAL: Saudi military entry — 'reserved right.' AJ headline: 'trust gone.' If triggered, all Gulf operations end.

WATCH: UAE Habshan — already shutdown. Further Iranian attacks on UAE energy = complete economic paralysis.
WATCH: US missile resupply — Zelensky data (800+ Day 1, 60-65/mo). If drawdown forced, Gulf allies exposed.
WATCH: Insurance market — IRGC named targets = premiums catastrophic. Coverage may become unavailable.
WATCH: Oil trajectory — $110 today. If IRGC follows through on targets: $130-150. Dubai crude already $150+.
WATCH: Swedish execution — European compliance tightening? Bank channel impacts?
signalsKIP_fa: بحرانی: سپاه اهداف نام‌برده — تخلیه. اگر حمله: تعطیلی.
بحرانی: عربستان — 'اعتماد رفت.' اگر وارد: همه توقف.
بحرانی: پزشکیان = سپاه رسمی. OFAC جدید.
نظارت: حبشان — تعطیل. حملات بیشتر = فلج.
